name: meridian
description: Meridian — autonomous Meteora DLMM liquidity agent for Solana (LLM-powered)

scripts.test:docker-ollama-host: docker compose run --rm --no-deps -e LLM_BASE_URL=http://host.docker.internal:11434/v1 -e LLM_API_KEY=ollama -e LLM_MODEL=${LLM_MODEL:-qwen2.5:3b} meridian npm run test:ollama
scripts.docker:test: docker compose run --rm --no-deps meridian node -e "import('./config.js').then(m => console.log('Docker smoke OK — deployAmountSol=', m.config.management.deployAmountSol)).catch(e => { console.error(e); process.exit(1); })"
